data.title: voAIce Corporation™ Launches OliviaAI™, a Fully Autonomous AI Communications Platform Designed to Replace Missed Opportunities in Retail Dealerships
data.description: In Los Angeles, voAIce Corporation unveiled their latest innovation - OliviaAI. This cutting-edge AI communications platform is designed to oversee all customer interactions through phone, text, email, and web chat seamlessly and autonomously. Unlike chatbots or workflow automation systems, OliviaAI functions as a live communication system, eliminating the inconsistency often associated with human follow-up in dealership operations. By providing continuous and simultaneous management of customer interactions, OliviaAI aims to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in customer service. This technology signifies a shift towards more reliable and responsive customer communication.

data.title: Dr. Feridun Hamdullahpur, Chairman of AMTD Group, Appointed to the Global Strategic Advisory Board of HKUST (GZ)
data.description: On April 7, 2026, companies AMTD Group Inc., AMTD IDEA Group, AMTD Digital Inc., and The Generation Essentials Group (TGE) shared a joint announcement across Paris, New York, and London. AMTD Group, listed under NYSE: AMTD and SGX: HKB, along with AMTD Digital Inc., listed as NYSE: HKD, and its subsidiary TGE, listed on NYSE: TGE and LSE: TGE, revealed exciting news.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Global Fibertech/
data.description: Global Fibertech has introduced Project AURA, providing solar-powered humanitarian lighting for disaster areas. The news release was issued on 07-Apr-2026 through PR Newswire. The company has updated the media contact's phone number for inquiries related to the project.

data.title: Garrett Metal Detectors Introduces Guide Hand-Held Metal Detector to GSA
data.description: In Garland, Texas, on April 7, 2026, Garrett Metal Detectors, a company based in Texas, shared news that their newly launched Guide™ handheld device is now accessible on the GSA Advantage website. The Guide™ was introduced in the summer of 2025 and has received acclaim from users. Many have commended its features and performance, leading to a surge in its popularity. This milestone marks a significant advancement for Garrett Metal Detectors as they continue to expand their reach.

data.title: Changes in financial calender
data.description: AS Pro Kapital Grupp is expected to release its audited financial results for the year 2025 on April 24, 2026, during week 17 of the year.

data.title: eGain Announces Enterprise AI Platform Connectors for Copilot, Claude, Gemini, and Cursor
data.description: eGain has introduced connectors that bring together Copilot, Claude, Gemini, and Cursor into a single governed knowledge source. This provides a consolidated platform for trusted and compliant AI outputs.
74Software reported a total of voting rights and shares in its share capital on March 31, 2026.

data.title: CropX Expands Sensor Portfolio with Apex, Bringing High-Resolution Root Zone Data to the CropX Platform
data.description: Today in Tel Aviv, Israel, CropX Technologies, a prominent player in digital agronomy solutions, revealed the incorporation of Apex into its sensor lineup. This new sensor offers multiple depth options and ongoing, detailed root zone sensing. This innovative product aims to enhance precision agriculture practices and improve crop yields.

data.title: JOOLA Files to Protect Patented Propulsion Core Technology Against 11 Paddle Brands
data.description: JOOLA's dedication to progressing pickleball through innovative engineering is reflected in recent measures taken - guaranteeing protection for investors in innovation. Based in North Bethesda, Maryland, on April 7, 2026, JOOLA, renowned in racquet sports, continues to be a trusted name in the pickleball community.

data.title: Axon Tackles Public Safety's Data Overload With Three New AI Tools
data.description: Axon Vision has been launched to aid in the identification of events in real-time camera feeds, offering enhanced situational awareness. The software integrates with Axon Assistant to provide secure and compliant artificial intelligence, enabling the extraction of operational insights and continuous intelligence in field operations. This development was announced in Scottsdale, Arizona on April 7, 2026, by Axon, a prominent player in the public safety sector listed as AXON on the Nasdaq.
